column1: # 前作 Sierra 通用 parser/系統回應複用（自動種子，逐條可再校）
What do you want to inspect?

column2: 都已經無聊到想爬牆了喔？

column1: You can't. There's no key in this game!
column2: 不行啦，這遊戲根本沒有鑰匙這種東西！
是啊，你可能也會這樣做！

column1: Obviously, restraint is no problem for you, Larry.
column2: 很明顯，「節制」對你來說根本不存在，賴瑞。

column1: Wouldn't you rather just remain friends?
column2: 你不覺得，我們還是當朋友就好嗎？

column1: You have no reason to do that.
It just lies there, under your feet.
What do you want to give?

column2: 那不是你的東西，不能拿去送人。

column1: There's no reason to take it.
Ok, but I don't usually do that!
column2: 好啦，但我不常幹這種事！
你沒看到什麼特別的東西。

column1: You don't have time for that.
You must type a description for the game.
column2: 你必須為遊戲輸入描述。

column1: Your save game disk is full. You must either use another disk or save over an existing saved game.
column2: 你的存檔磁片已滿。你必須使用另一張磁片或覆蓋現有的存檔。

column1: That game was saved under a different interpreter. It cannot be restored.
column2: 該遊戲是用不同的直譯器存檔的。無法還原。

column1: That doesn't appear to be a proper sentence.
column2: 這似乎不是適當的句子。

column1: Please insert your %s disk in drive %s.
column2: 請在 %s 磁碟機中插入你的 %s 軟碟。

column1: DURING THE GAME: Click at the top of the screen or press ESC to use the menus. Additional shortcuts are shown there.       IN TYPING WINDOWS: Arrows, Home and End move the cursor, or click anywhere with the mouse. Ctrl-C clears the line.       IN DIALOG WINDOWS: Enter selects the outlined item, or click on items with the mouse. Tab and Shift-Tab move between choices. ESC always cancels.
column2: 遊戲進行中：點擊螢幕上方或按 ESC 開啟選單，選單中會顯示更多快捷鍵。       輸入視窗中：方向鍵、Home 和 End 可移動游標，也可用滑鼠點擊任意位置；Ctrl-C 可清除整行文字。       對話視窗中：Enter 選取框選項目，也可用滑鼠點擊項目；Tab 與 Shift-Tab 可在選項間切換；ESC 一律取消。

column1: Select the game that you would like to restore.
column2: 選擇你想要讀取的遊戲。

column1: Type the description of this saved game.
column2: 輸入這個存檔遊戲的描述。

column1: This directory/disk can hold no more saved games. You must replace one of your saved games or use Change Directory to save on a different directory/disk.
column2: 這個目錄/磁碟已無法儲存更多遊戲。你必須替換其中一個存檔遊戲，或使用「改變目錄」在不同的目錄/磁碟上儲存。
